requirement_topic.en: ZICTA Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ZICTA型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: ZICTA型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain ZICTA type approval before importation or sale in Zambia, under the Information and Communications Technologies Act No. 15 of 2009. Applications must be supported by test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories. The ZICTA approval certificate must accompany the goods, and the approval label or reference must appear on the product and its packaging. CE marking and FCC authorisation are not recognised as equivalents. SADC harmonised type approval is under development and not yet operative.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据《信息和通信技术法》第15号（2009年），在进口或于赞比亚销售前取得ZICTA型式批准。申请须附有ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的检测报告。ZICTA批准证书须随货同行，批准标签或参考号须标注于产品及包装上。CE标志和FCC授权不被视为等同认可。SADC协调型式批准正在制定中，尚未生效。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據《資訊及通訊技術法》第15號（2009年），在進口或於尚比亞銷售前取得ZICTA型式批准。申請須附有ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的檢測報告。ZICTA批准證書須隨貨同行，批准標籤或參考號須標注於產品及包裝上。CE標誌和FCC授權不被視為等同認可。SADC協調型式批准正在制定中，尚未生效。

standards_or_laws: Information and Communications Technologies Act No. 15 of 2009 (Zambia)

summary.en: China SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for radio frequency equipment, plus MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment. GB standards (e.g. GB 15844, GB 8702) apply domestically. SRRC and NAL approvals are China-domestic only and are not recognised by ZICTA.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型式批准（工信部）适用于射频设备，以及工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）。GB标准（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境内适用。SRRC和NAL批准仅限于中国境内，不被ZICTA承认。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型式批准（工信部）適用於射頻設備，以及工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）。GB標準（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境內適用。SRRC和NAL批准僅限於中國境內，不被ZICTA承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate ZICTA type approval required; CE and FCC authorisations are not accepted. SRRC and NAL approvals have no legal standing in Zambia. Test reports must be from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories. ZICTA approval certificate must accompany goods; approval label or reference must appear on product and packaging.
gap.zh: 须另行取得强制性ZICTA型式批准；CE和FCC授权不被接受。SRRC和NAL批准在赞比亚不具法律效力。检测报告须来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室。ZICTA批准证书须随货同行；批准标签或参考号须标注于产品及包装上。
gap.zht: 須另行取得強制性ZICTA型式批准；CE和FCC授權不被接受。SRRC和NAL批准在尚比亞不具法律效力。檢測報告須來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室。ZICTA批准證書須隨貨同行；批准標籤或參考號須標注於產品及包裝上。

source.publisher: ZICTA — Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ZICTA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Zambia under the ICT Act No. 15 of 2009. Chinese SRRC and NAL approvals are not recognised. A separate ZICTA approval process, supported by ILAC/MRA lab test reports, must be completed and the approval reference displayed on the product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 根据《信息和通信技术法》第15号（2009年），ZICTA型式批准对于所有在赞比亚进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC和NAL批准不被承认。须完成独立的ZICTA批准程序（需ILAC/MRA实验室检测报告支持），并在产品上显示批准参考号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 根據《資訊及通訊技術法》第15號（2009年），ZICTA型式批准對於所有在尚比亞進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC和NAL批准不被承認。須完成獨立的ZICTA批准程序（需ILAC/MRA實驗室檢測報告支持），並在產品上顯示批准參考號。
